acceptance_checks: Context Engine produces u27/context_report.json and u27/context_manifest.md for this repo.
Handoff Engine produces u27/handoff.json and u27/HANDOFF_PACKET.md from the context report.
Proof Ledger records passing tests, CLI smoke, package build, and boundary scan evidence.
Boundary Engine reports unsupported=0 for README.md.
u27-check launch gate is explicitly assessed for CLI applicability.
boundary_notes: This dogfood packet proves the toolchain sequence for this repo only.
u27-check is a launch-surface gate; CLI-only repos may record it as not applicable rather than force a web-app check.
constraints: Keep public claims inside recorded proof.
Do not expand Handoff Engine into Proof Ledger, Boundary Engine, Context Engine, or launch QA.

launch_gate.reason: Run after implementation and public-surface updates, before a real user reaches the launch path.

objective: Dogfood the Unit27 system order on Handoff Engine and preserve the generated context, handoff, proof, boundary, and launch-gate artifacts.

proof_cases.claim: Context Engine produced a context report and manifest for the handoff target.
proof_cases.expected: The context scan command exits 0 and writes inspectable context artifacts.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.

proof_cases.claim: Handoff Engine produced a handoff packet from the recorded objective and context.
proof_cases.expected: The handoff build command exits 0 and writes handoff JSON plus a Markdown packet.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.

proof_cases.claim: The project test suite passes in the current local checkout.
proof_cases.expected: The configured test command exits 0 and stores stdout/stderr as evidence.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.

proof_cases.claim: The primary CLI or demo command runs successfully.
proof_cases.expected: The smoke command exits 0 and produces inspectable output.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.

proof_cases.claim: The project can produce its expected build or package artifact.
proof_cases.expected: The build command exits 0 and stores build output as evidence.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.

proof_cases.claim: Boundary Engine reports no unsupported public claims for the README.
proof_cases.expected: The boundary scan exits 0 and writes a boundary register.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.

proof_cases.claim: The launch-gate role is explicitly assessed for this repository.
proof_cases.expected: The assessment records whether u27-check is applicable before any launch-surface claim is made.
limits: This claim covers the recorded handoff objective only.
